Localization.Description: A user who is not on the allowed users list performed an operation with a key pair. This may indicate an attacker's attempt to create a rogue connection to a virtual machine via SSH or limit the ability to legitimately connect to a host.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} (not on the allowed users list) deleted a key pair on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} (not on the allowed users list) created a key pair on host {event_src.host}
